info.description:
Production-style inventory + POS REST API built with Gin, GORM and MySQL.
Authenticate via POST /auth/login, then click "Authorize" and enter: Bearer <access_token>.
info.title: Inventory Management API

post.summary: Log in and receive access + refresh tokens

get.summary: Get the current authenticated user + permissions

post.summary: Rotate the refresh token and get a new access token

get.summary: List categories (paginated, searchable)
List customers (paginated, searchable)

parameters.description: Search by name, email or phone
parameters.name: search

get.summary: Dashboard summary (KPIs, finance, low stock, top products, trend)
Customer ledger — full statement with running balance
Supplier ledger — full statement with running balance
Payment history (optionally filter by party type)

post.summary: Receive a payment from a customer (reduces customer due)

get.summary: List products (paginated, searchable)
Get a product by id
List purchases (paginated)

post.summary: Create a purchase invoice (increases stock + supplier due, transactional)

delete.summary: Void a purchase (reverses stock + supplier due, transactional)

get.summary: Customers with outstanding due
Purchase report for a date range
Sales report for a date range
Current stock report with total stock value
Suppliers we owe money to
List purchase returns (paginated)

post.summary: Return goods against a purchase invoice (decreases stock + supplier due)

get.summary: Find a purchase by invoice no with returnable quantities
Get one purchase return with items (for the return invoice)
List sale returns (paginated)

post.summary: Return goods against a sale invoice (increases stock + reduces customer due)

get.summary: Find a sale by invoice no with returnable quantities
Get one sale return with items (for the return invoice)
List sales (paginated)

post.summary: Create a sale invoice (decreases stock + customer due, transactional, oversell-guarded)

delete.summary: Void a sale (returns stock + reverses customer due, transactional)

get.summary: List suppliers (paginated, searchable)

post.summary: Upload an image, returns its URL

get.summary: List users (requires user.manage)
